sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53964" key="katavelme/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταϝελμένος</orth>, <sense id="n53964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατειλέω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταϝέργω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατείργω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταϝοικίδδω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατοικίζω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
